name: Manufacturing
tagline: Streamline production, manage inventory, and ensure on-time delivery.
description: Codeverta empowers manufacturers with end-to-end visibility across every stage of production — from raw material procurement to finished goods delivery. Our platform integrates shop floor operations with back-office systems so your teams always work from a single source of truth.
challenges: Disconnected systems between production, inventory, and finance
Difficulty tracking work-in-progress across the shop floor
Manual scheduling causing delays and resource waste
Lack of real-time visibility into machine utilization

solutions.title: Production Planning & Scheduling
solutions.description: Automated scheduling that adapts to real-time changes in demand, resources, and capacity — minimizing idle time and bottlenecks.

solutions.title: Inventory & Materials Management
solutions.description: Track raw materials, WIP, and finished goods in real time with automated reorder triggers and multi-warehouse support.

solutions.title: Quality Control
solutions.description: Define inspection checkpoints, capture defect data, and generate compliance reports without leaving the platform.

solutions.title: Equipment & Maintenance
solutions.description: Schedule preventive maintenance, track asset history, and reduce unplanned downtime with alerts and dashboards.

testimonial.quote: Codeverta gave us complete visibility from order to shipment. Our on-time delivery improved by 42% in the first six months.
testimonial.author: Operations Director

name: Trading & Distribution
tagline: Manage procurement, orders, and supply chains efficiently.
description: In a world of fluctuating demand and complex supplier networks, Codeverta gives trading and distribution companies the agility to move fast, buy smart, and fulfill orders with precision — all in one platform.
challenges: Managing multiple suppliers across different regions and currencies
Order tracking spread across emails, spreadsheets, and legacy tools
Poor demand forecasting leading to overstock or stockouts
Difficulty reconciling purchase orders with received goods

solutions.title: Procurement Management
solutions.description: Centralize supplier management, automate purchase orders, and track deliveries from a single dashboard.

solutions.title: Order & Fulfillment
solutions.description: Manage the full order lifecycle — from quotation to delivery — with automated status updates and customer notifications.

solutions.title: Demand Forecasting
solutions.description: AI-assisted forecasting based on historical sales, seasonality, and market signals to prevent costly inventory imbalances.

solutions.title: Multi-Currency & Tax
solutions.description: Handle international transactions with built-in multi-currency support, exchange rate management, and local tax compliance.

testimonial.quote: We cut our order processing time in half and reduced inventory holding costs significantly within the first quarter.
testimonial.author: Supply Chain Manager

name: Retail
tagline: Boost sales, manage inventory, and enhance customer experience.
description: Whether you run a single flagship store or a multi-location retail chain, Codeverta unifies your point-of-sale, inventory, and customer data so you can deliver consistent, personalized experiences at every touchpoint.
challenges: Disconnected POS and inventory causing stock discrepancies
No unified view of customer behavior across locations
Promotions and pricing managed manually across channels
Difficulty identifying top-performing products and stores

solutions.title: Point of Sale Integration
solutions.description: Sync transactions from every checkout lane and channel in real time, with automatic stock deductions and revenue tracking.

solutions.title: Customer Loyalty & CRM
solutions.description: Build loyalty programs, track purchase history, and send targeted promotions that bring customers back.

solutions.title: Inventory & Replenishment
solutions.description: Set reorder points per SKU per location and automate purchase requests to prevent stockouts during peak seasons.

solutions.title: Sales Analytics
solutions.description: Dashboards that surface your best-selling items, underperforming categories, and margin leakage across all stores.

testimonial.quote: We finally have one system for everything — inventory, sales, and our loyalty program. It transformed how we run our stores.
testimonial.author: Retail Operations Head

name: Engineering & Construction
tagline: Manage large-scale projects, resources, and budgets with ease.
description: Construction projects fail on poor coordination, not poor intention. Codeverta gives project managers, finance teams, and on-site crews a shared command center to track progress, control costs, and hit every milestone.
challenges: Budget overruns due to lack of real-time cost tracking
Resource conflicts across concurrent projects
Fragmented communication between site and office teams
Difficulty generating progress reports for clients and stakeholders

solutions.title: Project Planning & Milestones
solutions.description: Define project phases, assign tasks, and track completion against timelines with Gantt views and dependency mapping.

solutions.title: Budget & Cost Control
solutions.description: Compare actual vs. planned costs in real time, with alerts when spending approaches thresholds.

solutions.title: Resource & Crew Management
solutions.description: Allocate labor and equipment across projects, avoid double-booking, and track utilization by role.

solutions.title: Contractor & Subcontractor Management
solutions.description: Manage contracts, approvals, and payments for all third-party vendors in one place.

testimonial.quote: For the first time, our project directors and finance team are looking at the same numbers. We avoided a major overrun on our last bid.
testimonial.author: Project Director

name: E-commerce
tagline: Manage orders, track customers, and grow online sales.
description: Scaling an online business means managing more SKUs, more orders, and more customer expectations simultaneously. Codeverta connects your storefront, warehouse, and finance — so you can grow without the chaos.

heroStat.label: Order volume handled without added headcount

challenges: Manual order processing unable to keep up with volume spikes
Returns and refunds managed through disconnected tools
No centralized customer profile across multiple sales channels
Shipping delays caused by poor warehouse coordination

solutions.title: Order Management System
solutions.description: Automate order capture, routing, and fulfillment from every sales channel — website, marketplace, or social.

solutions.title: Returns & Refunds
solutions.description: Streamline the returns process with automated approval flows, restocking triggers, and instant refund tracking.

solutions.title: Customer 360
solutions.description: See every customer's full purchase history, preferences, and support interactions in one profile.

solutions.title: Warehouse & Shipping
solutions.description: Coordinate pick, pack, and ship operations with shipping carrier integrations and real-time tracking updates.

testimonial.quote: During our biggest sale ever, Codeverta processed 10,000 orders in one day without a single system hiccup. Absolute game changer.
testimonial.author: Co-founder

name: Education
tagline: Simplify student admissions, courses, and fees with one platform.
description: From enrollment to graduation, Codeverta helps educational institutions remove administrative friction so educators can focus on what matters — teaching. Manage every student journey from a single, secure platform.

heroStat.label: Less time spent on admin tasks

challenges: Manual enrollment and fee collection prone to errors and delays
No centralized record of student academic progress
Difficulty communicating updates to students and parents at scale
Compliance reporting done manually at end of term

solutions.title: Admissions & Enrollment
solutions.description: Digital application workflows, document collection, and enrollment confirmation — all without paper.

solutions.title: Course & Schedule Management
solutions.description: Build and publish course catalogs, assign instructors, and manage timetables with conflict detection.

solutions.title: Fee & Payment Collection
solutions.description: Generate fee schedules, send reminders, accept online payments, and reconcile automatically.

solutions.title: Student Portal & Communication
solutions.description: Give students and parents a self-service portal for grades, attendance, schedules, and announcements.

testimonial.quote: Our admissions team handles twice the applicants now with the same staff. And parents finally stop calling us about fee receipts.
testimonial.author: Principal

name: Professional Services
tagline: Streamline project management, billing, and client collaboration.
description: Agencies, consultancies, and service firms run on relationships and time. Codeverta helps you track every billable hour, manage client projects transparently, and invoice without chasing spreadsheets.
challenges: Time tracking done informally, leading to under-billing
Client projects managed across too many disconnected tools
Invoicing delays impacting cash flow
No visibility into team utilization and project profitability

solutions.title: Time & Expense Tracking
solutions.description: Log hours by project, client, and activity — with mobile-friendly entry and manager approval flows.

solutions.title: Project & Task Management
solutions.description: Plan deliverables, set deadlines, assign responsibilities, and share progress with clients in real time.

solutions.title: Billing & Invoicing
solutions.description: Auto-generate invoices from tracked time and approved expenses, with custom billing rates per client.

solutions.title: Client Collaboration Portal
solutions.description: Give clients a branded portal to review deliverables, approve milestones, and view invoices without email back-and-forth.

testimonial.quote: We recovered 18% more revenue just by having accurate time tracking. The ROI on Codeverta was obvious in the first month.
testimonial.author: Managing Partner

name: Financial Services
tagline: Track finances, manage portfolios, and ensure compliance effortlessly.
description: Financial firms operate in a high-stakes environment where accuracy, security, and compliance are non-negotiable. Codeverta provides the infrastructure to manage client portfolios, regulatory reporting, and internal finances with confidence.
challenges: Regulatory reporting done manually with high risk of error
Client portfolio data scattered across legacy tools
Slow reconciliation between transactions and ledgers
Difficulty maintaining audit trails for compliance reviews

solutions.title: Portfolio & Client Management
solutions.description: Track client accounts, holdings, and transactions in real time with consolidated reporting.

solutions.title: General Ledger & Reconciliation
solutions.description: Automated bank reconciliation and double-entry bookkeeping that closes books faster and more accurately.

solutions.title: Compliance & Reporting
solutions.description: Generate regulatory reports with full audit trails, version history, and role-based access controls.

solutions.title: Risk & Alert Management
solutions.description: Set thresholds and triggers that alert teams to exposure, anomalies, or compliance gaps before they escalate.

testimonial.quote: Our compliance team's quarterly audit used to take two weeks. With Codeverta, we complete it in three days.
testimonial.author: CFO

name: Healthcare
tagline: Manage patient records, appointments, and hospital operations seamlessly.
description: Healthcare providers need systems that are reliable, secure, and built for people — not just processes. Codeverta helps clinics and hospitals reduce administrative burden, improve care coordination, and keep patient data safe.
challenges: Paper-based patient records causing delays and errors
Appointment scheduling inefficiencies leading to long wait times
Billing and insurance claims processed manually
No centralized view of hospital-wide resource utilization

solutions.title: Patient Records (EMR)
solutions.description: Secure, structured electronic medical records with role-based access — accessible to the right staff at the right time.

solutions.title: Appointment & Scheduling
solutions.description: Online and front-desk scheduling with automated reminders that cut no-show rates significantly.

solutions.title: Billing & Insurance
solutions.description: Streamline invoicing, insurance claim submission, and payment reconciliation in one integrated workflow.

solutions.title: Pharmacy & Inventory
solutions.description: Track medicine stock, manage expiry dates, and automate reorders so critical supplies are never out.

testimonial.quote: Patient wait times dropped, billing errors dropped, and staff morale improved. Codeverta touched every part of how we operate.
testimonial.author: Hospital Administrator

name: Non-profit
tagline: Streamline fundraising, donor management, and project execution.
description: Non-profits are asked to do more with less, every day. Codeverta gives mission-driven organizations the tools to manage donors, track program impact, and stay financially transparent — without enterprise-level complexity or cost.
challenges: Donor data scattered across spreadsheets and email threads
Difficulty tracking restricted vs. unrestricted funding
Grant reporting done manually from disconnected sources
No clear visibility into program budgets and spend

solutions.title: Donor Management & CRM
solutions.description: Track every donor interaction, gift history, and communication preference in one place — and never let a relationship go cold.

solutions.title: Fundraising Campaigns
solutions.description: Plan and track campaigns with goals, timelines, and real-time donation tracking against targets.

solutions.title: Grant & Fund Management
solutions.description: Segregate funds by grant or program, track restricted spending, and generate compliance-ready reports for funders.

solutions.title: Volunteer & Project Coordination
solutions.description: Manage volunteer rosters, assignments, and hours alongside your program delivery milestones.

testimonial.quote: We finally have a clear picture of where every dollar goes. Our board is happier, our funders are confident, and our team is less stressed.
